gauge.name: Trinity River at Trinidad

impacts.statement: Major flooding will occur along the right bank to agricultural fields and cattle ranches.
Major flooding will occur along the right bank to agricultural fields and cattle ranches.
Major flooding will occur along the right bank to agricultural fields and cattle ranches.
Moderate flooding will occur along the right bank to agricultural fields and the cattle industry.
Minor flooding to woodlands and low land areas will occur on the right bank of the river.
Minor flooding occurs along the right bank of the river. Low woodlands for one mile along right bank will begin to flood.

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are issued as needed during times of high water, but are not routinely available.
